'''thajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:abandonly|abandonly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:abandonly|abandonly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thajate|thajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thajatesher|thajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thajatesherĂ«m|thajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thajatero|thajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thajateshĂ«|thajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thajateshĂ«m|thajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithajatero|gokithajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithajateshĂ«|gokithajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithajateshĂ«m|gokithajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothajankerom|gothajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothajankeshĂ«|gothajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothajankeshĂ«m|gothajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothajankeya|gothajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thajaterom|thajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thajatemu|thajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thajateya|thajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithajaterom|gokithajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithajatemu|gokithajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithajateya|gokithajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thajajate|thajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thajajatesher|thajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thajajatesherĂ«m|thajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thajajatero|thajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thajajateshĂ«|thajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thajajateshĂ«m|thajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithajajatero|gokithajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithajajateshĂ«|gokithajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithajajateshĂ«m|gokithajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothajajankerom|gothajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothajajankeshĂ«|gothajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothajajankeshĂ«m|gothajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothajajankeya|gothajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thajajaterom|thajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thajajatemu|thajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thajajateya|thajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithajajaterom|gokithajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithajajatemu|gokithajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithajajateya|gokithajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠte|thĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠtesher|thĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠtero|thĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠjĂŠtero|gokithĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠterom|thĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠtemu|thĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠjĂŠteya|thĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠjĂŠterom|gokithĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠjĂŠteya|gokithĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafjafte|thafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafjaftesher|thafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafjaftesherĂ«m|thafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafjaftero|thafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafjafteshĂ«|thafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafjafteshĂ«m|thafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafjaftero|gokithafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafjafteshĂ«|gokithafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafjafteshĂ«m|gokithafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafjafnkerom|gothafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafjafnkeshĂ«|gothafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafjafnkeshĂ«m|gothafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafjafnkeya|gothafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafjafterom|thafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafjaftemu|thafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafjafteya|thafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafjafterom|gokithafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafjaftemu|gokithafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafjafteya|gokithafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
